decisions.relationship_evidence: Retrospectively measures WHO HIVDR early warning indicators across 50 Tanzanian HIV clinics.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV drug-resistance surveillance application of the indicators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an importation-and-transmission model for dengue outbreaks, but the abstract does not establish forecasting from surveillance data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Not an explicit lineage source for surveillance-data forecasting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Nowcasts outdoor flea activity from weather and Google Trends rather than forecasting infectious disease outcomes from surveillance data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Targets vector activity, not the exact forecasting concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Builds and compares GAM, GRU, and ARMA-GARCH forecasts of ILI using Chinese sentinel surveillance data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative evaluation of surveillance-based infectious-disease forecasts.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes and benchmarks a GNN method that nowcasts influenza outbreaks from weekly city-level ILI-rate data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of a surveillance-rate forecasting model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Nowcasts mosquito abundance from meteorological variables; malaria epidemic peaks are only a downstream utility assessment.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The forecast target is vector abundance rather than infectious disease surveillance data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses WAHIS animal-disease reports and ZINB regression to forecast annual outbreaks through 2030.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete forecasting application using reported animal-disease surveillance events.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Integrates retrospective primary-care impact estimates with microsimulation forecasts under alternative policy scenarios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete health-impact application including infectious causes of child mortality.
supported_label_variants: integrated multicountry evaluation and forecasting analysis

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combines retrospective evaluation of USAID mortality effects with forecasts of deaths under funding-cut scenarios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete impact-and-forecasting application covering HIV/AIDS, malaria, and other infections.
supported_label_variants: retrospective impact evaluation and forecasting analysis

decisions.relationship_evidence: Integrates retrospective ODA mortality estimates into country microsimulations forecasting alternative defunding scenarios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application covering mortality from several communicable diseases.
supported_label_variants: integrated retrospective evaluation and forecasting analysis

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses estimated R0 and stochastic simulations to quantify counterfactual dengue epidemic sizes under reactive-intervention timings and intensities.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete intervention-effect analysis using a reproduction metric.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates daily Rt and uses a stochastic model to quantify the effect of air-travel restriction on Ebola importation risk.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete intervention evaluation incorporating effective reproduction numbers.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Fits a renewal-process transmission model and estimates vaccination counterfactuals for infections and deaths in Japan.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 vaccination evaluation using the counterfactual reproduction-number approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a framework centered on reproduction-number estimates for counterfactual analysis, intervention evaluation, and feedback control.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and validation of the canonical methodological framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The title explicitly identifies this record as an author correction to the vaccination evaluation using the counterfactual reproduction number.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal correction of the exact concept application.
named_source_mentions: Evaluating the COVID‑19 vaccination program in Japan, 2021 using the counterfactual reproduction number

decisions.relationship_evidence: The title explicitly identifies this record as a correction to the vaccination evaluation using the counterfactual reproduction number.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal correction of the exact concept application.
named_source_mentions: Evaluating the COVID-19 vaccination program in Japan, 2021 using the counterfactual reproduction number

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses effective reproduction numbers and counterfactual cluster-growth simulations to estimate HIV diagnoses averted by PrEP.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV intervention analysis using reproduction metrics and counterfactual simulations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes and evaluates a machine-learning HFMD prediction and early-warning algorithm optimized with a genetic algorithm.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of an infectious-disease prediction model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents a random-forest model forecasting county-level COVID-19 cases one to four weeks ahead.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and evaluation of a machine-learning forecast model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes an adaptive-gradient LSTM ensemble method for predicting COVID-19 cases from multivariate data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit machine-learning method development with comparative evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes an ARIMA-LSTM hybrid with Bayes-Attention fusion to forecast future epidemic cases from multiple sources.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a multi-source machine-learning forecasting method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes Bayesian symbolic regression to learn predictive incidence models from reported cases and testing rates in real time.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and validation of a machine-learning incidence-prediction approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Trains random-forest models on COVIS and environmental data to forecast Vibrio vulnificus infection risk.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete machine-learning forecast application using infection-surveillance data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes an evolutionary-sampling, imputation, optimization, and random-forest framework for dengue outbreak prediction.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and validation of a novel machine-learning prediction framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an XGBoost model with national surveillance and contextual features to predict provincial leptospirosis outbreak risk.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete disease-specific machine-learning prediction application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a transformer model with multi-source fusion and attention mechanisms for county-level COVID-19 forecasts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological framework for infectious-disease forecasting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a hybrid graph and deep-learning pipeline for robust seven-day-ahead epidemic incidence forecasts under noisy data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and stress-testing of a machine-learning forecasting method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces an LLM-processing pipeline for participatory symptom reports and shows improved pertussis forecast accuracy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit novel use of machine learning to augment infectious-disease forecasting.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces DeepCoV, a protein-language-model framework forecasting dominant SARS-CoV-2 lineages one month ahead.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and benchmarking of a deep-learning evolutionary forecast framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and validates an LSTM data-fusion model for forecasting influenza activity and deriving warning thresholds.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development using multi-source surveillance data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Extends an analytical re-emergence approach and fits a stochastic SIR model to project dengue skip years and outbreak probabilities.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and evaluation of a mechanistic outbreak-projection approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies an established semimechanistic Bayesian hierarchical model to estimate intervention effects on SARS-CoV-2 transmission.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application of a mechanistic-statistical model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a stochastic mechanistic transmission model fitted by Bayesian particle MCMC to reconstruct time-varying Reff.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a mechanistic model with statistical inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a new pharmacometric SIR-plus-vaccination model fitted to influenza surveillance data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a mechanistic model statistically informed by surveillance observations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes Gaussian-process regularization and time-varying compartmental parameters to improve epidemic forecasts from uncertain data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a statistical-mechanistic parameter-estimation framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a transmission forecasting model combining hospital admissions and mobility data to estimate transmission and project healthcare demand.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete real-time COVID-19 application of combined mechanistic and observational modeling.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes an SEIR model with Kalman-filter and moving-horizon state and parameter estimation for variant dynamics.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a mechanistic model with recursive statistical estimation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a stochastic SVEIR model with low-pass and extended Kalman filters to estimate Rt and vaccination rates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 application of mechanistic dynamics plus statistical filtering.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes particle filtering with a stochastic SEPIAR model and benchmarks Rt estimation against EpiEstim.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and validation of a mechanistic-statistical estimation approach.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an extended SEIR dynamic model and cascaded observer for real-time reproduction-number estimation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit mechanistic-model and statistical-observer development.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes MPSTAN, which incorporates metapopulation epidemiological structure into a spatiotemporal neural network for epidemic forecasting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and benchmarking of a hybrid epidemiological–machine-learning model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses stochastic differential equations with a gamma correction to estimate time-varying transmission parameters and forecast peaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 case study combining mechanistic equations with statistical correction.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents ANN-MPX, combining neural networks with SIR and force-based epidemic models to predict elimination success.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of an AI–mechanistic hybrid model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a meteorology-driven SIRS model augmented with antigenic variation to simulate and predict seasonal influenza.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete influenza application combining mechanistic dynamics with observed covariates.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a physics-guided neural network combining spectral graph features, epidemic parameters, and compartmental constraints.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and ablation testing of a hybrid AI–mathematical framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews molecular and sequence-based typing methods, identifying limitations of conventional surveillance and deployment gaps.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological review relevant to typing for outbreak detection and surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews current and emerging molecular typing methods and their specific advantages and disadvantages for surveillance and outbreak detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological review of the canonical concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes an international consensus for MLVA development, validation, nomenclature, and quality control in surveillance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological consensus and guidance source.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates MLVA discriminatory performance against PFGE and MLST for ESBL-producing E. coli outbreak typing.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit performance evaluation of a molecular typing method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses HAV sequencing practices and proposes harmonized procedures for cross-border surveillance and outbreak response.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit expert-derived methodological guidance on genomic surveillance procedures.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops multilevel genome typing and demonstrates its ability to distinguish known Salmonella outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a scalable genomic typing system.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Performs phylogenetic, mutation, and lineage analyses of SARS-CoV-2 sequences from Bangladesh.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete molecular epidemiology and genomic-surveillance application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses whole-genome sequencing and phylogenetic analyses to characterize circulating avian H3N8 genotypes and reassortment.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete genomic investigation supporting influenza surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops, validates, and implements a Yersinia enterocolitica cgMLST scheme for surveillance and outbreak clustering.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and validation of a genomic typing scheme.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides NanoCore software for cgMLST-like genomic surveillance from Nanopore or Illumina reads and validates its accuracy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit software implementation for bacterial genomic surveillance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Implements a Galaxy portal with custom WGS pipelines for microbial typing, characterization, and outbreak detection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit operational bioinformatics implementation used by public-health laboratories.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Validates cgMLST and wgMLST against hqSNP analysis across 11 STEC outbreaks in PulseNet 2.0.

decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete clinical and genomic surveillance application.

decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of multi-source hotspot prediction.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes an integrated near-real-time system using a point-process model to detect anomalous gastrointestinal-disease patterns.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates excess pneumonia mortality during a known outbreak but does not apply or develop an outbreak-anomaly detection method.
